{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323201728BB70B0B7C9C4EEB756CB"}"},"total":2086},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578465224514126654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不是俗套女频文，热血，激昂，战斗场面，大场面描写非常好，极其有代入感，就是主角带第四天灾和胆气未失的正规军守城的故事，兼顾网游搞笑，兵团玩法，主角其实算半个工具人，逼格高，帅，但是应该是照着群像写的，最后一句，很热血很热血很热血","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":40,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268248EEB756CB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227578465224514126654%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227569222719812668441%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764501530,"group_id":"7569222719812668441","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3pLoxsQUzZZArYqlVSjxdk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"108196897953","user_name":"喜欢烛光鱼的土灵宗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108196897953","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1700141167,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7569222719812668441","book_info":{"abstract":"洛尘穿越到大夏王朝，成为江南贵族子弟，本以为可以过完清闲富贵的一生。
却不想碰上了女真入侵，山河破碎。
家中父亲，兄长全部战死沙场，而洛尘也因为坚持主战，被皇帝派去沦陷区送死。
好在洛尘绑定了玩家召唤系统。
可以将这个世界伪装成游戏，来吸引地球的玩家加入自己阵营作战。
面对这个从未玩过的真实游戏，众多玩家化身帕鲁。
不仅自备粮草，种田打灰，科研创造。
而且还要上阵杀敌，冲锋陷阵。
面对这种悍不畏死的军队，女真被打一步步后退，直呼撼山易，撼洛家军难。
……
然而就在洛尘准备指挥玩家北伐中原，收复旧都之时。
朝中奸臣却联合昏君要赐洛尘死罪。
当这份圣旨被挂在游戏论坛之时，数百万的玩家暴怒了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/925439332008489896ab6a0072bda5cd","author":"起名真难6","author_id":"","book_id":"7569222719812668441","book_name":"圣旨赐死？我反手挂上游戏论坛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7569222768974119449","read_count":"107636","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"893486"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"397","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,争霸,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df9555093a49d3bfee7dce3ef948c950~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452248&x-signature=njhlXtxSICAmouisqCLfBYfouro%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52209358942","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323201728BB70B0B7C9C4EEB756CB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"l
